events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a situation where work around "Boxes, fittings & fill" is photographed from one angle only, and the critical label, torque sheet, or clearance dimension needed for the referenced requirement is outside the frame. The task is to evaluate the described field condition.

Key issue: The critical information needed to verify compliance (label, torque sheet, clearance dimension) is not visible/available. Without this information, I cannot determine whether the work complies with NEC 314.16 (box fill), 300.14 (length of free conductors), or 314.28 (pull box sizing).

Since the critical evidence is outside the frame and cannot be verified, the appropriate decision is "needs_more_info" rather than pass or fail. I can't confirm compliance or non-compliance without the necessary data.

Let me construct the JSON response.

    "Critical label, torque sheet, or clearance dimension required to verify compliance is outside the photograph frame",
    "Unable to confirm box fill calculations per NEC 314.16 without visible conductor counts and box volume marking",
    "Unable to verify free conductor length per NEC 300.14 from single-angle photo",
    "Unable to confirm pull box sizing per NEC 314.28 without clearance dimensions"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Re-photograph or inspect the installation from additional angles to capture box volume label, conductor count, and clearance dimensions",
    "Obtain torque documentation and manufacturer labeling for fittings in question",
    "Measure and record free conductor lengths at each box to confirm minimum 6 in. (150 mm) per NEC 300.14",
    "Verify pull box dimensions against raceway entries to confirm compliance with NEC 314.28 sizing rules"
  ],
  "rationale": "The referenced code articles (NEC 314.16, 300.14, 314.28) each require specific dimensional or quantitative data to evaluate compliance. With only a single-angle photograph and the critical label, torque sheet, or clearance dimension outside the frame, there is insufficient evidence to determine pass or fail. The work cannot be accepted or rejected without the missing data.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 314.16",
    "NEC 300.14",
    "NEC 314.28"
  ]
}
